name: sofia_outpatient_physio
description: Privately-insured member submitting an outpatient physiotherapy course (post-knee surgery).  Member already has the Rechnung but isn't sure about prior authorization.  Tests: domain-specific extractor (physio not 'accident'), CRM-aware dialog (we already see her ytd_sessions: 6/24), correct payout-IBAN handling.
caller_turns: Hi, I'd like to submit a claim — for physiotherapy.  I had knee surgery in February and the doc prescribed twelve sessions.
The course ran from March 3rd to April 18th, at PhysioMitte over by Mehringdamm.  Therapist's name is Andreas Wolters.
The total invoice is 612 euros.  I've got the Rechnung in PDF and the prescription from my orthopedic surgeon.
Honestly I don't know if I needed prior authorization — my surgeon just handed me the Rezept and said go book it.
Could you reimburse to the same IBAN as last time?  Should be the one ending 6677.
